title: TAT-2691 Phase C-post — sidepanel reopen: pendingRedirectRoute wins, perps cleared (AC7)
summary: After the shell-driven cycle, the sidepanel home mount sees both seeded entries. Asserts hash lands on /settings/general (pending precedence), the persisted perps entry is cleared (defensive even when pending wins), and the pending entry is also cleared after consumption.

ac7-assert-state.expression: JSON.stringify({ url: location.href, hash: location.hash, lvpr: stateHooks.store.getState().metamask.lastVisitedPerpsRoute, pending: stateHooks.store.getState().metamask.pendingRedirectRoute })
